name: Garlic Burgers
recipeIngredient: 2 each Pieces bread ( torn in small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the beef, bread and egg. Add as much minced fresh garlic and garlic powder as desired – about half a jar of powder or 10-15 cloves of garlic.
2. Using your hands, blend all the ingredients together to form meat patties.
3. Shape the mixture into small football-shaped ovals.
4. Heat several tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
5. Pan fry the burgers until they are well done and the garlic aroma is throughout the house.
6. Drain excess grease on paper towels.
These burgers are delicious hot, but even BETTER when chilled and eaten cold.
